name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for observability, replay, or integration workflows
title: "[Feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem does this solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe the proposed solution.

## Scope

- UI only
- backend only
- sidecar / integration layer
- docs only
- cross-cutting

## Risk Level

- low-risk
- moderate-risk
- experimental

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or links if useful.
